caption: A man and a woman stand at the rear of a white Renault van parked in a paved outdoor area. The woman wears a long black coat and a beige scarf, while the man wears a dark coat, a blue scarf, and tan trousers. In the initial scene, the man stands by the open back of the van, which contains several cardboard boxes. As the sequence progresses, the man closes the rear doors of the vehicle. The van features the license plate "BH-888-HD" and text on the upper rear that reads "Bibliothèques Sans Frontières". In the background, there are bare trees and a white building. By the end of the clip, the man has closed the doors and stands next to the woman, who is looking toward him. A red carpet or runner is partially visible on the ground to the right of the vehicle.
